latest.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
latest.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the outset of the US-Israel war with Iran.

radar.title: Exhausted by Iran War, Tehran Transforms for Khamenei’s Funeral
radar.summary: Throughout the capital, the government is using Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s funeral to project strength at a time of great uncertainty for Iran.
radar.details: Throughout the capital, the government is using Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s funeral to project strength at a time of great uncertainty for Iran.

radar.title: China Raises Pressure on Taiwan With Expanded Coast Guard Patrols
radar.summary: Beijing sent two ships to patrol the waters east of Taiwan, a new campaign to challenge the island’s control of waters crucial to any future invasion.

radar.title: Nigeria says two nationals killed in South Africa amid rise of anti-migrant attacks
radar.summary: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".
